title: Netflix Acquires InterPositive, the AI Film Production Company of Ben Affleck, for $587 Million
excerpt: Netflix recently disclosed in regulatory filings that the company has completed the acquisition of AI film production startup InterPositive for $587 million in
content_html:
Netflix recently disclosed in regulatory filings that the company has completed the acquisition of AI film production startup InterPositive for $587 million in cash. The transaction was previously announced in March, but the exact amount was not disclosed at the time; Bloomberg had previously reported that the deal could be as high as $600 million.

InterPositive was co-founded by actor and director Ben Affleck, and focuses on using artificial intelligence technology to assist in the film production process. Affleck stated that the company aims to "protect the power of human creativity" through AI tools, helping film production teams improve efficiency during the post-production phase, especially in addressing issues such as missing footage from real-world shoots, background replacement, and lighting adjustments.

According to information previously released by Netflix, the InterPositive team will join Netflix as a whole after the acquisition, and Affleck will serve as a senior advisor, continuing to participate in the advancement of related technologies and creative directions.

At the same time, Netflix revealed in its latest financial report that approximately 300 films are now using generative AI technology. This acquisition further demonstrates that Netflix is accelerating its layout of an AI-driven film production system, optimizing content creation processes through technological means, while exploring the integration path between artificial intelligence and traditional film creation.

As generative AI continues to mature in areas such as video generation, post-production, and special effects processing, the film industry is undergoing a deep transformation in its production model, and AI-assisted creative capabilities have gradually become an important direction in competition among streaming platforms.

sentences.zh: Netflix最近在监管文件中披露，该公司已以5.87亿美元现金完成对人工智能电影制作初创公司InterPositive的收购。

sentences.zh: 此次收购进一步表明Netflix正在加速布局人工智能驱动的电影制作体系，通过技术手段优化内容创作流程，同时探索人工智能与传统电影创作的融合路径。

sentences.zh: 随着人工智能在视频生成、后期制作、特效处理等领域的不断成熟，电影行业的制作模式正在发生深刻变革，人工智能辅助创作能力逐渐成为流媒体平台竞争的重要方向。

content_html_zh:
Netflix最近在监管文件中披露，该公司已以5.87亿美元现金完成对人工智能电影制作初创公司InterPositive的收购。 该交易此前已于3月份宣布，但当时并未透露具体金额；彭博社此前曾报道称，这笔交易的金额可能高达 6 亿美元。

InterPositive 由演员兼导演本·阿弗莱克 (Ben Affleck) 共同创立，专注于利用人工智能技术辅助电影制作过程。 阿弗莱克表示，公司旨在通过人工智能工具“保护人类创造力”，帮助电影制作团队提高后期制作阶段的效率，特别是解决现实拍摄中镜头缺失、背景更换和灯光调整等问题。

根据Netflix此前公布的信息，收购后InterPositive团队将整体加入Netflix，阿弗莱克将担任高级顾问，继续参与相关技术和创意方向的推进。

与此同时，Netflix在最新财报中透露，目前约有300部电影正在使用生成式AI技术。 此次收购进一步表明Netflix正在加速布局人工智能驱动的电影制作体系，通过技术手段优化内容创作流程，同时探索人工智能与传统电影创作的融合路径。

随着人工智能在视频生成、后期制作、特效处理等领域的不断成熟，电影行业的制作模式正在发生深刻变革，人工智能辅助创作能力逐渐成为流媒体平台竞争的重要方向。
